📤 How to Report Connection Issues
Click the
"Copy Connection Info"
button above to copy your connection details
Click the
"Email Helpdesk"
button to open your email client
Paste the copied information into the email body (Ctrl+V or Cmd+V)
Add a description of the issue you're experiencing
Send the email to
helpdesk@ics.uci.edu
Direct Contact:
helpdesk@ics.uci.edu
🔧 Trouble Connecting?
Most UCI and ICS campus resources require that you are connected to a campus network or to the campus VPN.
Important:
If you are off campus, you will need to connect to the UCI VPN to access most campus resources. See the resources below for VPN setup instructions.
📚 Helpful Resources
Campus IP Address Spaces
List of ICS and UCI address spaces. The first chart identifies IP address ranges that are generally considered to be "on campus".
ICS Campus VPN Troubleshooting Information
Help with connecting to the ICS VPN and resolving common connection issues.
UCI Campus VPN
Download information and instructions from OIT about the UCI campus VPN.
MyIP ICS
Use this site to determine your on-campus IP address and verify your connection.
❓ Need More Help?
ICS Computing Support:
helpdesk@ics.uci.edu
UCI Office of Information Technology:
https://www.oit.uci.edu/help/
